rationale: Official binary AO1 target and target-only field.
action_required_before_gold: Keep as AO1 target only and exclude from all predictor matrices

variable_or_feature_group: Delivery_Status equals Shipping canceled; Order_Status CANCELED or SUSPECTED_FRAUD
rationale: Canceled or fraud records are not normal completed deliveries and may contaminate the non-late class.
action_required_before_gold: Default proposal is to exclude Shipping canceled records from primary AO1 Gold and retain only sensitivity or audit flags

rationale: Post-shipment or post-delivery fields may directly encode delivery or fulfillment outcomes.
action_required_before_gold: Keep out of AO1 and AO2 predictors and retain only for audit dashboard or population sensitivity logic

rationale: Official AO2 target and target-only field.
action_required_before_gold: Keep as AO2 target only and exclude from predictor matrices

decision_area: AO2 profit duplicates and realized margin proxies
variable_or_feature_group: Benefit_per_order; Order_Item_Profit_Ratio; direct profit transformations; realized margin fields
rationale: Benefit_per_order duplicates the AO2 target and Order_Item_Profit_Ratio is a realized profit proxy.
action_required_before_gold: Exclude from predictors and use only for target audit descriptive historical margin governance or dashboard caveats

rationale: Order_Item_Total is selected as the AO3 denominator while Sales_per_customer and item_net_sales_amount duplicate the same order-value concept.
action_required_before_gold: Retain Order_Item_Total as the single denominator and do not include duplicate value fields in the same AO2 predictor matrix

rationale: Gross sales duplicates or overlaps price times quantity and may be redundant with the selected order-value denominator.
action_required_before_gold: Keep out of default AO2 predictors until the team decides whether gross value is needed

rationale: Price is order-time valid but duplicate representations exist and can strengthen formula reconstruction when paired with quantity discount and value.
action_required_before_gold: If approved choose one item-level representation only and exclude duplicate price fields

rationale: Discount fields are likely order-time valid but amount rate and share duplicate related commercial concepts.
action_required_before_gold: If approved prefer one rate representation and defer discount share unless derived commercial ratios are explicitly approved

rationale: Quantity is decision-time valid and low-cardinality but AO2 use belongs with the commercial-field policy.
action_required_before_gold: Use only one representation and document AO2 use with the selected commercial field set

rationale: Low-cardinality field with no missingness but business semantics are not fully validated.
action_required_before_gold: Do not include by default until the team confirms order-creation semantics and operational validity

variable_or_feature_group: Days_for_shipment_scheduled; Shipping_Mode; scheduled_shipping_days; shipping_speed_tier; shipping_mode_normalized; is_same_day_or_next_day_shipping; is_standard_shipping
rationale: Planned service information is expected before dispatch and has strong AO1 descriptive signal without post-shipment leakage.
action_required_before_gold: Include as Gold candidate features while avoiding unnecessary raw and engineered duplicates

rationale: Raw timestamp is required for chronological split and lineage but should not be an unconstrained model feature.
action_required_before_gold: Retain for split lineage and validation only and use derived calendar features for modeling

variable_or_feature_group: order_year; order_quarter; order_month; order_week_of_year; order_day_of_month; order_day_of_week; order_hour; order_is_weekend; order_season
rationale: Deterministic features derived only from the order creation timestamp.
action_required_before_gold: Include as Gold candidate features with any later encoding fit on training data only

rationale: Category and department descriptors are order-time product mix fields with clear business meaning.
action_required_before_gold: Include as candidate product mix features and prefer descriptors over raw numeric IDs

rationale: Numeric codes duplicate clearer descriptors and may be treated incorrectly as numeric signal.
action_required_before_gold: Do not use as direct predictors in first Gold matrices; keep only for stable keys or traceability

decision_area: Product IDs names and catalog keys
rationale: Product-level identifiers and names are high-cardinality or key-like and risk overfitting or unstable catalog shortcuts.
action_required_before_gold: Exclude from first model-ready predictor set and revisit only with grouping frequency thresholds or time-aware aggregate design

rationale: EDA found one observed value and source semantics remain unclear.
action_required_before_gold: Exclude from first Gold model predictors and retain only as descriptive metadata if needed

variable_or_feature_group: Customer_Segment; Customer_Country; Customer_State; Market; Order_Country; Order_Region; Order_State; normalized equivalents
rationale: Coarse geography and segment fields are known at order creation and supported by the availability map.
action_required_before_gold: Include as candidate features with encoding fit on training data only and cardinality reviewed during Gold

rationale: Deterministic order-time flags avoid raw postal codes and precise coordinates.
action_required_before_gold: Include as candidate features if generated by the existing customer regional feature job

variable_or_feature_group: Customer_City; Order_City; Customer_Zipcode; Order_Zipcode; Latitude; Longitude; customer_city_normalized; order_city_normalized; customer_region_key; order_region_key; latitude_rounded; longitude_rounded
rationale: Fields are granular high-cardinality privacy or stability sensitive and Order_Zipcode has high missingness.
action_required_before_gold: Exclude direct use from first model-ready Gold predictors and revisit only with approved grouping coarse bins or train-only aggregates

rationale: Raw customer IDs have high cardinality and historical aggregates require time-aware train-only logic.
action_required_before_gold: Keep raw customer IDs out of predictors and do not build customer historical aggregates in first Gold scope

rationale: Order and item identifiers are row keys rather than predictive business signals.
action_required_before_gold: Retain only for joins deduplication traceability and validation

rationale: Technical metadata supports reproducibility and troubleshooting not predictive modeling.
action_required_before_gold: Retain only in audit or lineage views and exclude from AO1 and AO2 predictors

rationale: Personal or sensitive identifiers are not operational modeling signals and should not appear in ordinary dashboard outputs.
action_required_before_gold: Exclude from predictive Gold and ordinary dashboards while retaining only in raw traceability layers if already present

rationale: Product image is a catalog asset and product description is empty in the reviewed dataset.
action_required_before_gold: Exclude from predictors and use only for dashboard catalog display or metadata audit if needed

decision_area: Engineered features missing from issue 18 input
variable_or_feature_group: product_catalog_key; product_list_price; item_unit_price; item_discount_amount; item_discount_share_of_gross; customer_region_key
rationale: These are generated by later feature scripts and are not conceptually invalid but must follow their family-specific policy.
action_required_before_gold: Gold may consume existing feature-engineering outputs but should not create new feature logic in this task and should apply family-specific decisions

rationale: Official policy is earliest 80 percent development and most recent 20 percent held-out test by order date.
action_required_before_gold: Retain order_date_DateOrders for split assignment and do not fit preprocessing or thresholds on held-out test data

variable_or_feature_group: targets outcomes actual shipping fields profit audit fields images assets status fields
rationale: Dashboard fields support interpretation but must stay separate from model matrices.
action_required_before_gold: Build separate dashboard audit outputs or clearly marked non-predictor columns and explicit predictor lists

rationale: AO1 imbalance is mild in the full Silver clone and resampling depends on chronological train validation distributions and model choice.
action_required_before_gold: Do not apply in Gold and defer to modeling training fold only after chronological split

rationale: Thresholds must be selected using validation data after model training.
action_required_before_gold: Do not set thresholds in Gold and document threshold selection as a modeling task

variable_or_feature_group: risk cutoff; margin cutoff; 2x2 priority groups; risk-only comparison; profit-only comparison
rationale: AO3 groups must use AO1 and AO2 predictions and validation-selected thresholds rather than actual test outcomes.
action_required_before_gold: Prepare support columns only and do not assign AO3 groups before modeling
